generated_exposure.exposure_text: Your local emergency services are being stretched thin by unnecessary drills. While we all want to be prepared, constant civil defense exercises waste taxpayer dollars and divert resources from real threats. Our neighbors in [State] saw a 20% increase in response times after over-investing in these programs. Let's focus on what truly keeps us safe - smart, targeted preparedness, not endless practice scenarios that do more harm than good. #SafetyOverDrills #SmartPreparedness
